archive_data.question_text: Who was the President of India between the years 1987 and 1992?

explanation.english: R. Venkataraman served as the President of India from 1987 to 1992. Giani Zail Singh was President from 1982-1987, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed served earlier (1974-1977), and Shankar Dayal Sharma succeeded Venkataraman (1992-1997).
explanation.tanglish: R. Venkataraman 1987-il irundhu 1992 varai Indiaavin President aaha paaniyal seythaar. Giani Zail Singh 1982-1987 varai President aaga irundhaar, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed 1974-1977 varai paaniyal seythaar, Shankar Dayal Sharma Venkataraman pin vandhu 1992-1997 varai President aanaar.

archive_data.question_text: Buddhist texts called Dipavamsa and Mahavamsa, which are the sources of information to Mauryan times, belong to which of the following countries?

explanation.english: Dipavamsa and Mahavamsa are ancient Buddhist chronicles written in Pali language that originated from Sri Lanka (Ceylon). These texts provide important historical information about the Mauryan period, especially regarding Emperor Ashoka and the spread of Buddhism to Sri Lanka.
explanation.tanglish: Dipavamsa matrum Mahavamsa engindra pali mozhiyil ezhutha pattadum baudha varalaadhu Sri Lanka (Ceylon) desaththil irundhu vandhadhu. Ividathu Maurya kaala varalaaru, ashoka chakravarthy matrum Lanka desaththil baudha madham payirchi seytha varalaatril mukkiyamaana aatchaikalaaga ulladhu.

archive_data.question_text: The Nalanda University was built in ________.

explanation.english: Nalanda University was located in the ancient kingdom of Magadha (modern-day Bihar) near Rajgir. It was a renowned Buddhist center of learning established in the 5th century CE and flourished until the 12th century.
explanation.tanglish: Nalanda University paandiya kaalaththu Magadha (innatriya Bihar) rajiyaththil Rajagriya pakkaththil amainthu irundhadhu. Idhu 5-aam nodi thalaththil ezhumbiya prasiddhamana baudha kalvi padapeedam, 12-aam thalaththu varai vaazhnthadhu.

archive_data.question_text: In which year did India win its first Olympic gold in hockey?

explanation.english: India won its first Olympic gold medal in hockey at the 1928 Amsterdam Olympics. The Indian hockey team, led by Jaipal Singh Munda, defeated the Netherlands 3-0 in the final. India went on to win six consecutive gold medals in hockey from 1928 to 1956.
explanation.tanglish: India 1928-aam aandu Amsterdam Olympics-il hockey-il thantha muthal Olympic pon medalai velliyathu. Jaipal Singh Munda thalaimaiyil irundha indian hockey kuzhu Netherlands-ai 3-0 endru mudivu seythu velliya sirappu seythadhu. India 1928-il irundhu 1956 varai thodarndhu aaru pon medalgalai hockey-il velliya sirappu seythadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Read the given statements and select the correct option regarding 'High Powered Money'. (i) High Powered Money consists of currency and cash reserves with the bank. (ii) High Powered Money includes demand deposits of the banks.

explanation.english: High Powered Money (also called Monetary Base or Reserve Money) consists of currency held by the public, cash reserves of banks with the RBI, and other deposits with the RBI. It does not include demand deposits of banks. Statement (i) is correct while statement (ii) is incorrect.
explanation.tanglish: High Powered Money (Monetary Base endrum solluvom) enginaal matamannilirukkum kaasu, bangalukku Reserve Bank-il therkkaiyaga irukkum kaasu matrum Reserve Bank-il mattetra depositehalai sollarum. Demand deposits-ai idhil serpadaadhu. Aache (i) sari, (ii) theriyadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Who set up the task force on Supportive Policy and Regulatory Framework for Micro- Finance in India in 1999?

explanation.english: NABARD (National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development) established the Task Force on Supportive Policy and Regulatory Framework for Micro-finance in India in 1999. This task force was headed by Shri S. P. Hazell and submitted its report in 1999 to promote and regulate microfinance institutions.
explanation.tanglish: NABARD (National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development) 1999-aam aandile Indiaavil Micro-Finance-kku anumadhi matrum kanman sudhandhiram seithu kudukka oru task force-ai amaithadhu. Ithai Shri S. P. Hazell thalaimaiyil ezhubinaar, microfinance santhaihalai valarikkum matrum kanivu seiyya 1999-il aatchaikkalai samarpithaar.
